question_text:

If I$$_2$$ is the moment of inertia of the carved out portion of the cylinder then $$\frac{I_1}{I_2}=$$ __________.
(Both I$$_1$$ and I$$_2$$ are about the axis of the cylinder)

(Given, g = 9.8 m/s$$^2$$ and $$\pi=\frac{22}{7}$$)
